# Scenario: golden-full-session refresh variant.
# Renders the finalized state from messages.json via /session/:id/message.
# Pairs with streaming-scenario.txt for a streaming-vs-refresh comparison
# covering the full pipeline: reasoning, multiple tools (bash + edit),
# multiple text parts, two messages, session.idle at end.

:session ses_golden
:directory /tmp/golden

:refresh golden-full-session/messages.json

# --- Assertions ---

:assert-contains investigate the login bug
:assert-contains Thinking
:assert-contains check the auth module
:assert-contains grep -n
:assert-contains auth.js
:assert-contains Found 3 usages
:assert-contains return false
:assert-contains TODO: fix
:assert-contains commit it
:assert-contains git status
:assert-contains Committed
